results.name: polukranos (phyrexian)
results.description: Polukranos, compleated.

results.name: polymorph
results.description: Effects that remove a permanent and replace it with another random one.

results.name: pooky
results.description: Garfield's teddy bear.

results.name: porcelain-metal armor
results.description: White armor used by Phyrexians of the Machine Orthodoxy

results.name: portmanteau
results.description: Cards named with a portmanteau—a word that's a combination of two words.

results.name: pose
results.description: Tags describing someone's pose.

results.name: potentially black border
results.description: Cards not intended for constructed play that could have been printed in a vintage/commander legal product instead if they were printed today.

results.name: potentially free
results.description: Cards that can be played without spending any resources (Mana, life, tapping creatures, etc). Cards must be able to be not free, to be potentially free.

results.name: power boost to all
results.description: Cards that provide power to all creatures you control. May be limited to certain types or colors.

results.name: power matters-individual
results.description: Effects which care about the power of one creature (or multiple creatures individually, as opposed to as a total).

results.name: power matters-total
results.description: Effects which care about the total power of some set of creatures.

results.name: power nine
results.description: Nine rare cards from Alpha considered to be the most powerful nine cards in the entire game.

results.name: powerstone
results.description: The powerstones were magical power sources used during the Brothers' War. Prolonged exposure led to a disease called phthisis.

results.name: prayer
results.description: People who appear to be in acts of prayer.

results.name: precognition
results.description: Cards that let you freely look at the top card of your library. You know, others don't.

results.name: precognition engine
results.description: Cards let you see the top card of your library and conditionally play it. See also [future sight engine](/tags/card/future-sight-engine) for an older variant in this vein.

results.name: predator (ship)
results.description: A Rathi/Phyrexian airship used to wage war on Dominaria.

results.name: predefined token
results.description: CR 111.10 - Some effects instruct a player to create a predefined token.

results.name: preexisting dnd background
results.description: Cards named after Dungeons & Dragons backgrounds that already exist! 🎲

results.name: presto
results.description: The wizard from the Dungeons and Dragons cartoon series

results.name: prevent etb
results.description: Cards that prevent permanents from entering the battlefield.

results.name: prevent mass blockers
results.description: Cards that sweepingly prevent blocks from happening.

results.name: prevent sacrifice
results.description: Cards that prevent something from being sacrificed.
